name: Apple Cinnamon Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Corn syrup, light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie crusts for a two-crust pie using a 9-inch pan. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon until well combined.
3. In another large bowl, combine apples, cranberries, and corn syrup.
4. Add the fruit mixture to the sugar mixture and stir to combine.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie crust-lined pan and dot with butter.
6. Place the second crust on top and flute the edges. Make four 4-inch slashes in the center of the crust, forming a criss-cross design.
7. Press lightly at the center points to form 8 petals. Brush the top crust with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 350°F and continue baking for 40 to 45 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Allow the pie to cool completely on a wire rack before storing in the refrigerator.
